case_title: VARO S.F. FEDERAL CREDIT UNION vs. DUNSON, JOSEPH

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARO S.F. FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DUNSON, JOSEPH SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARO S.F. FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNSON, JOSEPH $4,099.07 PRINCIPAL, $3,850.07 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,963.14 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE 11-AUG-94
